title: Test coverage of `opt_expr` is only 21.5%
body:
Appending `cover -d cov` to all `tests/opt/opt_expr*.ys` and merging the coverage files with this python script
```py
from pathlib import Path
from collections import defaultdict

if __name__ == "__main__":
    d = defaultdict(int)
    for file in Path('cov').iterdir():
        with open(file) as f:
            for line in f.readlines():
                if weh := list(filter(bool, line.strip().split(' '))):
                    _, count, tag = weh
                    if 'opt_expr' in tag:
                        d[tag] += int(count)
    # print(d)
    print([k for k,v in d.items() if v==0])
```
yields the following list of uncovered coverage tags in `opt_expr`:
`['opt.opt_expr.mod_mask', 'opt.opt_expr.div_shift', 'opt.opt_expr.divmod_zero', 'opt.opt_expr.mul_shift.unswapped', 'opt.opt_expr.mul_shift.swapped', 'opt.opt_expr.mul_shift.zero',
